title: Transmution
description: Adds the Transmutation Table that lets you transmute certain items (more to come later)
body:
## TRANSMUTE YOUR ITEMS, MAKE WHAT YOU NEED NOT WHAT YOU HAVE!

**Transmutation Table -**

Powerful block that lets you transmute items to others!

**Transmutable items -** (so far!)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Ink Sac -> Glow Ink Sac

- Cobblestone -> End Stone

- Glow Berries -> Chorus Fruit

- Honey Bottle -> Dragons Breath

- Amythest Shard -> Echo Shard

- Redstone -> Glowstone

- Lava Bucket -> Water Bucket

- Pumpkin -> Melon

- And a secret one for an advancement!

</details>





Hint (use if you have trouble!)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

A block with a face

</details>


More to come later :D
